message.content:
@startuml
title ユーザの詳細

actor "管理者" as manager
rectangle "ユーザー覧画面" as user_list
rectangle "詳細画面" as detail_screen
database "ユーザDB" as user_db

activate manager
activate user_list
activate detail_screen
activate user_db

manager -> user_list : 1. ユーザネームをクリック
user_list --> detail_screen : 2. 遷移
detail_screen -> user_db : 3. データ検索
user_db --> detail_screen : 4. ユーザ情報
detail_screen --> manager : 5. ユーザ詳細

deactivate user_db
deactivate detail_screen
deactivate user_list
deactivate manager

@enduml
